summary: Fixed. The deadlock in `Run()` (line 101-102) was caused by waiting on `<-done` before calling `s.queue.Close()`. If the goroutine was blocked inside `Pop()` (on `cond.Wait()`), it couldn't exit until `Close()` broadcast the wake-up signal — but `Close()` was never reached. Swapping the order unblocks the goroutine first, then waits for it to finish.
